title: Humming

genre_description: lullaby, drone, ambient, minimalist, no instruments, vocal only, a cappella, meditative, hypnotic, primal, extremely calm, female, breathy, warm, humming, mouth-closed, intimate, low register, 58 BPM, no melody variation, sustained tones, monotone, like breathing set to pitch
